mapper.select: SELECT p.freelancer_email, p.display_name, p.job_category, p.profile_file_id, p.is_portfolio_public, p.short_intro AS intro, p.description, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM portfolio_profile p WHERE p.freelancer_email = #{freelancerEmail}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO portfolio_profile ( freelancer_email, display_name, job_category, profile_file_id, is_portfolio_public, short_intro, description, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT u.email, u.name, u.job_category, u.profile_file_id, 0, '', '', NOW(), NOW() FROM user u WHERE u.email = #{freelancerEmail}
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_profile SET display_name = #{displayName}, job_category = #{jobCategory}, profile_file_id = #{profileFileId}, is_portfolio_public = #{isPortfolioPublic}, short_intro = #{intro}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE freelancer_email = #{freelancerEmail}
mapper.select: SELECT tech_stack FROM portfolio_profile_tech_stack WHERE freelancer_email = #{freelancerEmail} ORDER BY tech_stack ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO portfolio_profile_tech_stack ( freelancer_email, tech_stack, created_at ) VALUES ( #{freelancerEmail}, #{techStack}, NOW() )
